active_answer: freely given, enthusiastic, and reversible at any time
active_question: What three qualities does Anatomie Studio say consent must have during rope play?
edited_answer: Someone can say yes while still feeling uncomfortable, so partners should also pay attention to nonverbal cues.
edited_question: Why does Anatomie Studio say a verbal “yes” may not be sufficient evidence of comfort?
paraphrase_rationale: The replacement teaches a concrete limitation of checkbox-style consent instead of another memorized list of consent adjectives.
reason: The replacement teaches a concrete limitation of checkbox-style consent instead of another memorized list of consent adjectives.
support_evidence: - Someone can say yes and still not feel fully comfortable—watch for nonverbal cues.
